introSection: Poseidon is a Mack Rides water roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened on 12 July 2000.

sections.title: History
sections.content: In early 2022, Poseidon was closed for a major refurbishment, which included the replacement of some sections of track.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 22 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Poseidon is a Mack Rides water roller coaster located at Europa-Park in Rust, Baden Wuerttemberg, Germany. It opened on 12 July 2000.

In early 2022, Poseidon was closed for a major refurbishment, which included the replacement of some sections of track.



22 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
